en: Yes. It's Billy Bean of the Oakland A's. Yes.
You want to let us in? Pardon me?
On the curb. Uh, yeah, yeah.
Oh, thank you. Thank you, ma'am. Very kind.
How's the elbow, Scott? You know, it's good. It's really good. It's great.
I can't throw the ball at all.
ko: 공을 전혀 던질 수 없어요. 네.

en: Yeah, you've thrown your last ball from behind home plate, is what I'd say.
Well... The good news is, we want you at first.
ko: 좋은 소식은, 우리가 당신을 1루로 원한다는 거예요.
